name: CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc.
business: CCC is a leading SaaS and AI platform provider for the insurance economy, connecting insurers, repairers, automakers, and part suppliers. Its cloud technology digitizes mission-critical workflows for over 35,000 businesses, with a focus on automotive insurance claims and collision repair.

exposures.sentence: CCC is a leading Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) and AI platform provider for the multi-trillion-dollar insurance economy powering operations for insurers, repairers, automakers, part suppliers, and more.

Our AI solutions streamline existing insurance and repair processes including vehicle damage detection, claim triage, claim handling, repair estimating, intelligent claim review, and claim subrogation.
our ability to keep our data and information systems secure from data security breaches

the continued adoption of semi-autonomous or autonomous vehicles and the advent of improved automotive safety features, may potentially impact the future market for, and operations of, the insurance and automotive collision industries.

Our bodily injury claims synthesis solution, Medhub, was built to empower adjusters with a real-time understanding of the medical facts that they feel are likely to influence the outcome of the claim.

catalysts.sentence: During January 2025, the Company completed its acquisition of EvolutionIQ.

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. P&C insurance industry serviced over $1 trillion in DWP in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. P&C insurance industry alone serviced over $1 trillion in DWP in 2024.
